violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. New kitchen manager not yet certified. Course and test taken week prior and awaiting results.
Food supplies. — --Food item was prepared in private home. Deli sandwiches are being prepared in a home kitchen for resale in clubhouse. All food prep is to be conducted at licensed kitchen.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. 2 door upright cooler temping at 49 degrees F. Adjust/service/monitor as needed.
Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not provided. Provide thermometer for 2 door upright cooler used for deli sandwich storage.
Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate.
